title: Weighted Inventory
description: Unlock inventory slots based on your worn armor
body:
Weighted Inventory limits the amount of inventory spaces available to a player. Wearing armor will increase the number of available slots depending on the armor type. Different types of armor have different slot counts.

The amount of slots per armor piece can be changed using datapacks, By default the slots per armor type are as follows:

-   **Leather** - 2.25 slots (for a total of 9 slots)
-   **Iron / Chainmail** - 4.5 slots (for a total of 18 slots)
-   **Gold / Diamond / Netherite** - 6.75 slots (for a total of 27 slots)
